description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a global before_script installing tox via pip. Define four jobs in the default test stage named test:34, test:35, test:36, and test:pep8, each using the python:3.4, python:3.5, python:3.6, and python:3.6 Docker images respectively, all restricted to the master branch. Each job sets a TOX_ENV variable (py34, py35, py36, pep8) and runs the command tox -e $TOX_ENV, and each job is configured with when: always to always execute.
